optimization.selection_rule: highest exact total-goals bucket accuracy; tie-break by total-goals log loss then core interval accuracy
optimization.production_policy: current model remains primary; optimized model runs as shadow until adoption gates pass
optimization.optimized_model_spec_source: locked from the 2018+2022 grid search; set TOTAL_GOALS_FULL_GRID=1 to reselect

strength_allocation.selectionRule: lowest chronological validation log loss; tie-break by RPS

adoption_decision.reason: first round is diagnostic only; wait for a forward second-round sample
adoption_decision.recommendation_zh: 首轮只作诊断，等待至少8场第二轮前瞻样本后再判断。
